discord.commands.link.label: link
discord.commands.link.description: Link your Discord account to the web account.
discord.commands.link.message: Use the button below to link your Discord account.
discord.commands.link.missingConfig: Discord account linking is not configured yet. Ask an administrator to configure Discord auth before trying again.
discord.commands.status.label: status
discord.commands.status.notLinked: Your Discord account is not linked.
discord.commands.help.label: help
discord.commands.help.message: Use /account link to connect your Discord account and /account status to check it.
discord.messages.rateLimited: Too many Discord actions. Please wait and try again.
discord.messages.authRequired: Link your account before using this Discord action.
discord.messages.openAppUnavailable: Open App is unavailable because the web app URL is not configured. Use /account link or ask an administrator to set DISCORD_WEB_APP_BASE_URL.
discord.messages.linkConflict: This Discord account is already linked to another user.
discord.messages.unlinkConfirm: Confirm that you want to unlink your Discord account from this workspace.
